headline: Is Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FANG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Diamondback Energy, Inc. on Mispriced Assets’s Substack by Nick Nemeth. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FANG. Diamondback Energy, Inc.’s share was trading at $183.45 as of April 20th. FANG’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.02 and 9.56 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Diamondback […]

headline: Gear Up for Diamondback (FANG) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Diamondback (FANG) for the quarter ended March 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.

headline: Following UAE’s OPEC Exit Shock, Diamondback Energy Could Be the Smartest Bet Now
summary: The UAE’s decision to exit OPEC/OPEC+ has injected new uncertainty into oil markets and pushed crude prices above $100 per barrel. Low-cost Permian operator Diamondback Energy may be positioned as one of the clearest near-term beneficiaries.

headline: New Strong Buy Stocks for April 30th
summary: FANG, TAL, ABBNY, KFRC and AHKSY have been added to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) List on April 30, 2026.
